text:
is a single by Megumi Hayashibara. The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KICM-2121, it was released on 21 December 2022. https://vgmdb.net/album/123917 It contains the theme song of the P Godzilla vs. Evangelion ~G Cell Awakening~ pachinko machine. https://www.kingrecords.co.jp/cs/g/gKICM-2121/ Different exclusive itens were bundled with different shops and it would sell as long it lasted. http://king-cr.jp/artist/hayashi/news/
